pace.caveat: not fuel-corrected; tyre-management can mask true pace
pace.headline: ANT 0.66s/lap faster on like compounds

start.caveat: lap-1 swing within normal first-lap scatter
start.headline: ANT +0 places on lap 1

tyre.caveat: fuel burn partially offsets degradation; small stint counts
tyre.headline: ANT tyres degrade 0.078s/lap less on like compounds

where.caveat: based on 9 vs 10 unique comparable laps — significance is exploratory at this sample size

attribution.narrative: Sector 13 (4484-4687 m): 0.158 s to HAM [real (CI excludes 0)]. ANT brakes ~14 m later than HAM (entry); ANT carries ~3 km/h more apex speed (mid-corner).
Sector 4 (1161-1338 m): 0.104 s to ANT [real (CI excludes 0)]. ANT gets to full throttle ~32 m sooner (exit).
Sector 12 (4223-4484 m): 0.081 s to HAM [real (CI excludes 0)]. ANT carries ~7 km/h more apex speed (mid-corner).

where.headline: ANT gained in 5 of 14 micro-sectors
